Got an interesting visitor today. Ex-Xunlai by the name of Mi Shen showed up, ranting about how Joon shut his program down and dismantled his prototype (sounds like her). If completed, it'd be the largest mech ever built. All he needed to do was finish the design of its central power core—or so he says. Pieces should have been sent to the junkyard. Gonna have a scavenging team poke around, see what they can find. In the meantime, I've set him up in a lab to show what he can do. Keeping an eye on him—I think that one's playing a few cards short of a full deck.
